name: schema-registry-dag-dag-visualization-gateway
description: T208 DagVisualizationGateway — ROUTING archetype. Routes DAG visualization requests to appropriate renderer. Returns pre-built topology for frontend rendering.

nodes.description: Iron rule validation + DNA compliance check: routing only — delegates to renderer, reads pre-built topology from T197, never computes DAG inline, renderer selection logic
Retrieve ROUTING arch pattern + visualization-routing + renderer-selection + prebuilt-topology-read patterns for T208

Break T208 into: receive visualization request with format/mode params → select renderer based on params → load pre-built DagTopology from DATABASE → route to appropriate renderer → return rendering payload

Generate dag-visualization-gateway.service.ts — HTTP GET via DynamicController, selects renderer based on format or mode query param (e.g. 'graph', 'tree', 'matrix'), reads pre-built DagTopology document stored by T197, routes to appropriate renderer service. NEVER re-computes topology inline. Returns VisualizationPayload ready for frontend. Read-only — no mutations.
Named check validation: renderer_selected_from_params, reads_prebuilt_topology, never_computes_inline, read_only_no_mutations, returns_visualization_payload
Score generated code 0-100 against T208 iron rules: routing correctness, pre-built topology read, no inline DAG computation, renderer selection logic
Route: score >= 85 → n8 promote, score < 85 → n3 iterate
DPO triple: chosen=renderer-selection+prebuilt-topology-read+routing-only, rejected=inline-dag-compute OR single-renderer-hardcoded OR ignores-format-param. curriculumTier=1.
